ascii_art: в”Ӯ THE SPRAWL HOLE вҖ” Finn в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в–‘в–’в–“в–Ҳ old CRT  в–“в–’в–‘    в”Ӯ

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text_en: Underground bar, "The Sprawl Hole". The Finn's office. 3 meters wide, 6 meters long. Walls are old CRTs and cables. The Finn is in his mid-forties, a man of few manners. Always the same seat, always the same question.
lines.text_ko: м§Җн•ҳ мҲ м§‘ "The Sprawl Hole". Finnмқҳ мӮ¬л¬ҙмӢӨ. 3лҜён„° нҸӯ, 6лҜён„° кёёмқҙ. лІҪмқҖ мҳӣ CRTмҷҖ мјҖмқҙлё” лҚ•м§ҖлҚ•м§Җ. FinnмқҖ л§Ҳнқ”лҢҖ мӨ‘л°ҳ, л§Өл„Ҳк°Җ лӘЁмһҗлһҖ мӮ¬лӮҙ. лҠҳ к°ҷмқҖ мһҗлҰ¬, лҠҳ к°ҷмқҖ м§Ҳл¬ё.

lines.speaker: The Finn
lines.text_en: I need a jockey. The Finn's got a job. Sense/Net, first run, simple data extraction.
lines.text_ko: мһҗнӮӨк°Җ н•„мҡ”н•ҙ. Finnмқҙ мқјк°җмқҙ мһҲм–ҙ. Sense/Net, мІ« мӢӨн–ү, к°„лӢЁн•ң лҚ°мқҙн„° м¶”м¶ң.

lines.speaker: The Finn
lines.text_en: ICE is light. Wisp-class, maybe Hammer.
lines.text_ko: ICEлҠ” к°ҖлІјмҡё кұ°м•ј. Wispкёү, м–ҙм©Ңл©ҙ Hammerкёү.

lines.speaker: The Finn
lines.text_en: Don't get fancy. Jack in, find the data, jack out.
lines.text_ko: нҷ”л Өн•ҳкІҢ н•ҳм§Җ л§Ҳ. мһӯмқё, лҚ°мқҙн„° м°ҫкё°, мһӯм•„мӣғ.

options.text_en: I'm new. I just need the money.
options.text_ko: м ҖлҠ” мӢ м°ёмқҙм—җмҡ”. лҸҲл§Ң н•„мҡ”н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.
options.response_en: Good. K is your call sign. Don't get cocky.
options.response_ko: мўӢм•„. мјҖмқҙк°Җ л„Ө мҪңмӮ¬мқёмқҙм•ј. кұҙл°© л–Ём§Җ л§Ҳ.

options.text_en: I've been around. I know the risks.
options.text_ko: кІҪн—ҳмқҖ мһҲм–ҙмҡ”. мң„н—ҳлҸ„ м•Ңкі  мһҲкі мҡ”.
options.response_en: Sil. Good to have a veteran on board. Tessier-Ashpool owes you nothing, remember.
options.response_ko: мӢӨ. лІ н…Ңлһ‘мқҙ н•©лҘҳн•ҙмӨҳм„ң лӢӨн–үмқҙл„Ө. Tessier-AshpoolмқҖ л„ӨкІҢ л№ҡм§„ кІҢ м—Ҷм–ҙ.

options.text_en: I'm here to burn it all down.
options.response_en: Kas. Maelcum spoke of you. Don't make him a liar.
options.response_ko: м№ҙмҠӨ. Maelcumмқҙ мһҗл„Ө м–ҳкё°лҘј н–Ҳм–ҙ. к·ёлҘј мӮ¬кё°кҫјмңјлЎң л§Ңл“Өм§Җ л§Ҳ.

choice.common_response_en: Dixie'll be your backup. Now get lost.
choice.common_response_ko: Dixieк°Җ л„Ө л°ұм—…мқҙм•ј. мқҙм ң кәјм ё.

ascii_art: в–‘  в”Җв”Җ DATA GRID в”Җв”Җ       в–‘

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text_en: Finn's office, back room. Old couch. Wetware trodes. ICE-drip.
lines.text_ko: Finnмқҳ мӮ¬л¬ҙмӢӨ л’·л°©. лӮЎмқҖ couch. Wetware trodes. ICE-drip.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text_en: The Sprawl is hot tonight. You can feel the data streams in your teeth.
lines.text_ko: мҠӨн”„лЎӨмқҙ мҳӨлҠҳ л°Ө лңЁкІҒлӢӨ. лҚ°мқҙн„° мҠӨнҠёлҰјмқ„ мқҙл№ЁлЎң лҠҗлӮ„ мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text_en: ICE on the grid. Standard Wisp-class. Cheap, but it can still flatline a careless jockey.
lines.text_ko: Gridм—җ ICE. н‘ңмӨҖ Wispкёү. мӢёкө¬л Өм§Җл§Ң л¶ҖмЈјмқҳн•ң мһҗнӮӨлҘј flatline мӢңнӮ¬ мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.

outcomes.victory_ko: ICEк°Җ л¶„н•ҙлҗЁ. лҚ°мқҙн„° л…ёл“ң м§„мһ… к°ҖлҠҘ.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text_en: You pull the data from the Sense/Net node. It's a list of names. Employee IDs. Nothing you'd normally pay for.
lines.text_ko: Sense/Net л…ёл“ңм—җм„ң лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј кәјлӮёлӢӨ. мқҙлҰ„ лӘ©лЎқ. м§Ғмӣҗ ID. ліҙнҶөмқҙлқјл©ҙ к·ёлҹ° кұё мӮҙ мӮ¬лһҢмқҖ м—ҶлӢӨ.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text_en: The data is Tessier-Ashpool's payroll. A fact the Finn didn't disclose.
lines.text_ko: лҚ°мқҙн„°лҠ” Tessier-Ashpoolмқҳ кёүм—¬ лӘ…м„ём„ң. Finnмқҙ м•Ңл ӨмЈјм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ мӮ¬мӢӨ.

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text_en: You jack out. Back in the Sprawl Hole, Finn is already gone. The office is empty. There's a note on the desk:
lines.text_ko: мһӯм•„мӣғ. Sprawl HoleлЎң лҸҢм•„мҳӨлӢҲ, FinnмқҖ мқҙлҜё мӮ¬лқјмЎҢлӢӨ. мӮ¬л¬ҙмӢӨмқҖ л№„м—ҲлӢӨ. мұ…мғҒ мң„м—җ мӘҪм§Җк°Җ мһҲлӢӨ:

lines.speaker: Note
lines.text_en: "You weren't supposed to see that. вҖ” The Finn"
lines.text_ko: "мһҗл„Өк°Җ к·ёкұё ліј мқјмқҖ м—Ҷм—Ҳм–ҙ. вҖ” The Finn"

lines.speaker: Narrator
lines.text_en: Dixie Flatline appears in the construct. The construct that shouldn't exist.
lines.text_ko: Dixie Flatlineмқҙ кө¬м„ұмІҙм—җ л“ұмһҘн•ңлӢӨ. мЎҙмһ¬н•ҙм„  м•Ҳ лҗ  кө¬м„ұмІҙ.

lines.speaker: Dixie Flatline
lines.text_en: Hey cowboy. You got the data. Now what you gonna do with it?
lines.text_ko: м–ҙмқҙ м№ҙмҡ°ліҙмқҙ. лҚ°мқҙн„° мҶҗм—җ л„Јм—Ҳл„Ө. мқҙм ң м–ҙм©” кұҙлҚ°?

novice.description_en: K burns the data and leaves the Sprawl. A new jockey, with a fresh start.
novice.description_ko: мјҖмқҙк°Җ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј нғңмҡ°кі  Sprawlмқ„ л– лӮЁ. мғҲлЎңмҡҙ мһҗнӮӨ, мғҲлЎңмҡҙ мӢңмһ‘.

lines.speaker: K
lines.text_en: I burn it. I just wanted the money.

lines.speaker: Dixie Flatline
lines.text_en: Smart. The Sprawl has a short memory for those who don't make waves.
lines.text_ko: нҳ„лӘ…н•ҳл„Ө. л¬јкІ°мқ„ мқјмңјнӮӨм§Җ м•ҠлҠ” мһҗл“Өм—җ лҢҖн•ҙ мҠӨн”„лЎӨмқҖ кёҲл°© мһҠм–ҙлІ„л Ө.

novice.description_en: K keeps the data. The Finn finds him. Tonight.
novice.description_ko: мјҖмқҙк°Җ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј м§ҖнӮҙ. Finnмқҙ к·ёлҘј м°ҫлҠ”лӢӨ. мҳӨлҠҳ л°Ө.

lines.speaker: K
lines.text_en: I keep it. I might need it someday.

lines.speaker: Dixie Flatline
lines.text_en: Then Finn will find you. Tonight. Maybe sooner.
lines.text_ko: к·ёлҹ¬л©ҙ Finnмқҙ мһҗл„ӨлҘј м°ҫмқ„ кұ°м•ј. мҳӨлҠҳ л°Ө. м–ҙм©Ңл©ҙ к·ёліҙлӢӨ лҚ” л№ЁлҰ¬.

veteran.description_en: Sil leaks the data. Tessier-Ashpool dies by a thousand cuts. New enemies made.

lines.speaker: Sil
lines.text_en: I leak the data. Tessier-Ashpool dies by a thousand cuts.
lines.text_ko: лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј нҸӯлЎңн•ңлӢӨ. Tessier-AshpoolмқҖ мІң лІҲмқҳ мғҒмІҳлЎң мЈҪлҠ”лӢӨ.

lines.speaker: Dixie Flatline

lines.speaker: Dixie Flatline
lines.text_en: Then Mara's death is just business. Sprawl respects that, but Tessier-Ashpool won't.
lines.text_ko: к·ёлҹ¬л©ҙ л§Ҳлқјмқҳ мЈҪмқҢмқҖ к·ём Җ мӮ¬м—…мқҙ лҗҳл„Ө. мҠӨн”„лЎӨмқҖ к·ёкұё мЎҙмӨ‘н•ҳм§Җл§Ң, Tessier-AshpoolмқҖ к·ёлҹ¬м§Җ м•Ҡмқ„ кұ°м•ј.

heretic.description_en: Kas casts the data into the Loa network. The Sprawl hears it. The wheel breaks.
heretic.description_ko: м№ҙмҠӨк°Җ Loa л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬м—җ лҚ°мқҙн„°лҘј нҲ¬мӮ¬. мҠӨн”„лЎӨмқҙ л“ЈлҠ”лӢӨ. л°”нҖҙк°Җ л¶Җм„ңм§„лӢӨ.

lines.speaker: Kas

lines.speaker: Dixie Flatline
lines.text_en: Then the wheel breaks. Or you do. Either way, the Sprawl changes.

heretic.description_en: Kas takes it for himself. Power corrupts. Tessier-Ashpool made another.

lines.speaker: Kas
lines.text_en: I take it for myself. Power corrupts. Always.

lines.speaker: Dixie Flatline
lines.text_en: Then you become what you hate. Tessier-Ashpool made you. Welcome home.
